commands.name: convert
commands.description: Converts the interval into a set of cron expressions

options.name: --seconds
options.description: Optional to use seconds. Defaults without.

arguments.name: unit
arguments.description: The unit in seconds, minutes or hours

arguments.name: command
arguments.description: The optional command to add to the end of the cron expression

[False]

The optional command to add to the end of the cron expression
